# uptimekuma_monitor_sip_options (Data Source)

Get SIP Options monitor information by ID or name

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Read SIP Options monitor by name
data "uptimekuma_monitor_sip_options" "example" {
  name = "SIP Server Monitoring"
}

# Example: Read SIP Options monitor by ID
data "uptimekuma_monitor_sip_options" "by_id" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Monitor identifier
- `name` (String) Monitor name

### Read-Only

- `hostname` (String) Hostname or IP address being monitored
- `port` (Number) SIP port number being monitored
